org.apache.paimon.flink.source.table

Class PushedTableSource

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.flink.source.table.BaseTableSource
      • org.apache.paimon.flink.source.table.PushedTableSource
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsFilterPushDown, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsLimitPushDown, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsProjectionPushDown, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.DynamicTableSource, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.ScanTableSource

    public class PushedTableSource
extends BaseTableSource
implements org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsFilterPushDown, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsProjectionPushDown, org.apache.flink.table.connector.source.abilities.SupportsLimitPushDown
